description: Resolves an overloaded Fabric term to the concrete artifact(s) and the fabio command group that handles each. Term lookup normalizes spaces, hyphens, and underscores (so "materialized view", "materialized-view", and "materialized_view" are equivalent).

data.summary: Disambiguate 'materialized view' across Fabric workloads — it means three different things depending on whether you are in a Lakehouse, an Eventhouse/KQL database, or a Warehouse.

meanings.description: Pre-computed Delta table snapshot refreshed on a schedule.
Continuously-updated aggregation over a source table.
Use a regular view or a scheduled CTAS pattern.

data.default_action: If the workload is unclear, ask the user which workload they mean before proceeding.

notes: Available terms: materialized-view, dataflow, semantic-model, sql-endpoint. Each meaning maps to a command_group so agents route to the right place. Discover via 'fabio context list' or surfaced automatically in 'fabio context find'.

query_examples.description: Get the command group for each meaning.
Resolve the term for a specific workload.
